title: 20Pcs Purple Round Shape Foil Balloons, 18 Inch Round Metallic Foil Balloon, Giant Round Aluminum Helium Balloons For Photo Booth Birthday Wedding Halloween Christmas Party Decorations
features: Package Contents: Our set includes 20pcs 18inch round foil balloons, 1pc straw, and 1pc ribbon, designed to make your celebration stand out. You can create a stunning balloon display perfect for any occasion. This set gives you all the essentials to create a festive atmosphere, ensuring your party will be a hit from start to finish. You can combine round balloons of various colors to build an impressive decoration

Easy to Use:Round shape foil balloons come with a straw for easy inflation and a ribbon for easy tying. The straw can be used to fill with air, and after filling, the expansion port is flattened, automatically sealing without air leakage. These round balloons are very easy to inflate and can be filled with air or helium to create different effects. They have a self-sealing valve, no special tools or skills are required, easy to use, making it a convenient choice for party decoration

Widely Applications:Our round foil balloons ideal for enhanced decoration your banquet hall, living room or outdoor garden. They can be used to make balloon arches, balloon tunnels, perfect for decorate a wide range of occasions party, such as birthdays, weddings, baby shower, graduation, bachelorette, wedding, thanksgiving day, halloween, christmas, new year and so on. Whether for party or celebrations, these balloons also serve as stylish photography props

Premium Material:Our giant round aluminum balloons are made of good-quality foil and designed to maintain their shape and shine throughout the event. They are unbreakable, lightweight, and easy to hang and carry. The glossy finish adds a touch of elegance to any celebration. The foil balloons gleam beautifully under the party lights, creating a lively and joyful atmosphere while making your celebration truly unforgettable, add the surprise and fun of special occasions

Warm Tips:Please do not inflate the balloons beyond 90% to prevent any sudden bursting. Avoid exposure to heat,sharp objects, and friction. Note that balloons colors may vary slightly under different lighting conditions. Round shape foil balloons after the party, you can deflate them and store them for future events, recycle them, and reduce waste
